description: PR-mined (subgraph-extending): modeled after Rosemoe/sora-editor PR #267 'Added more keybindings' (merged 2022-10-18), which added CharPosition's zero-arg/2-arg/3-arg constructor overloads -- those are already baked into our pinned commit (43f7e8e2981...), so a literal forward-patch of PR #267's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit reproduces the SAME real transformation (growing CharPosition's constructor overload set) with the next overload in that spirit: a copy constructor. CharPosition.java is newly added to vendor.json by this edit (verified acyclic: only imports androidx.annotation.NonNull, java.util.Objects, and io.github.rosemoe.sora.util.IntPair, already in the subgraph).

expected.behavioralMarker: quick build reloaded CharPosition's copy constructor
